metadata.name: Kubernetes StatefulSet
metadata.description: Creates a Kubernetes StatefulSet with configurable image, replicas, optional service account, one container port, simple environment variables, optional resource requests and limits, and an optional volumeClaimTemplate for persistent storage.

items.name: resource_name
items.title: StatefulSet name
items.description: Name to use for the StatefulSet.

items.name: namespace
items.title: Namespace
items.description: Namespace for the resource.

items.name: app_label
items.title: App Label
items.description: App label value used for selectors and Pod labels.

items.name: service_name
items.title: Service name
items.description: Service name referenced by the StatefulSet for stable network identity.

items.name: replicas
items.title: Replicas
items.description: Number of Pod replicas.

items.name: pod_management_policy
items.title: Pod management policy
items.description: Policy used for Pod startup and termination ordering.

items.name: update_strategy
items.title: Update strategy
items.description: Strategy used when updating Pods.

items.name: service_account_name
items.title: ServiceAccount Name
items.description: ServiceAccount name for the Pod spec.

items.name: container_name
items.title: Container name
items.description: Name to use for the container.

items.name: image
items.title: Container image reference
items.description: Container image used by the StatefulSet.

items.name: image_pull_policy
items.title: Image pull policy
items.description: Policy used for image pulls.

items.name: ports_enabled
items.title: Container Port
items.description: Expose one container port.

items.name: container_port
items.title: Container port number
items.description: Container port to expose.

items.name: container_port_name
items.title: Port name
items.description: Name to use for the container port.

items.name: container_port_protocol
items.title: Port protocol
items.description: Protocol used for the container port.

items.name: env_literal_enabled
items.title: Literal Env Var
items.description: Add one literal environment variable.

items.name: env_literal_name
items.title: Literal Env Name
items.description: Literal environment variable name.

items.name: env_literal_value
items.title: Literal Env Value
items.description: Literal environment variable value.

items.name: env_secret_enabled
items.title: Secret Env Var
items.description: Add one secret-backed environment variable.

items.name: env_secret_name
items.title: Secret Env Name
items.description: Environment variable name sourced from a Secret.

items.name: env_secret_secret_name
items.title: Secret resource name
items.description: Secret name containing the value.

items.name: env_secret_secret_key
items.title: Secret key
items.description: Key within the Secret containing the value.

items.name: persistence_enabled
items.title: Persistent storage
items.description: Create a volumeClaimTemplate and mount it into the container.

items.name: volume_claim_name
items.title: Volume claim template name
items.description: Name used for the generated volumeClaimTemplate.

items.name: mount_path
items.title: Mount path
items.description: Container path where the claim is mounted.

items.name: storage_class
items.title: Storage Class
items.description: Storage class name. Leave empty to use the cluster default.

items.name: storage_size
items.title: Storage Size
items.description: Requested storage size.

items.name: access_mode
items.title: Access mode
items.description: Access mode used for the claim.

items.name: resources_enabled
items.title: Resources
items.description: Enable container resource requests and limits.

items.name: resources_cpu_limit
items.title: CPU limit
items.description: CPU limit for the container.

items.name: resources_cpu_request
items.title: CPU request
items.description: CPU request for the container.

items.name: resources_memory_limit
items.title: Memory limit
items.description: Memory limit for the container.

items.name: resources_memory_request
items.title: Memory request
items.description: Memory request for the container.
